---
title: "Identifying NFL Quarterback Archetypes via K-Means Clustering"
format:
  poster-typst:
    size: "48x36"
    poster-authors: "Shubhan Tamhane"
    departments: "Department of Statistics, University of Connecticut"
    institution-logo: ""          # path to UConn logo if you have one
    footer-text: "Spring 2026"
    footer-url: "github.com/ShubhanTamhane1/nfl-qb-archetypes"
    footer-emails: ""
    footer-color: "1A1F3C"       # your dark navy
    num-columns: 3
---
